hero_subtitle: SFTY delivers a unified compliance operating view that supports MLRO board reporting with structured evidence packages and scalable risk oversight for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across disconnected workflows
problem_description: Board members and MLROs struggle to access consolidated compliance evidence and metrics, making it difficult to assess operational risk accurately. This fragmentation slows reporting, weakens audit readiness and leaves leadership without clear visibility into compliance controls.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects compliance workflows, provider outputs, case evidence and regulatory metrics into a unified operating layer so executives and boards gain clear visibility and audit-ready oversight.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to structured reports
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider checks, risk data and case decisions into audit-ready evidence and clear compliance reports for executive risk oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One executive view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified compliance operating layer connecting evidence, cases, decisions, and metrics to support scalable MLRO reporting and board risk oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured MLRO reporting, preserving audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence within a governed compliance operating layer.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support MLRO board reporting workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance cases feed executive risk reports
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports board-level compliance review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for enterprise compliance visibility layers
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executive teams with consolidated compliance visibility, risk metrics and structured oversight across digital asset workflows to support informed risk control and regulatory preparedness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support board-level reporting?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates compliance data into structured dashboards, evidence packages and narrative reports tailored for board review and MLRO reporting workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and linked evidence to support audit readiness and explainable compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: SFTY connects outputs from existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational workflow without disrupting current toolsets.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing providers, organizing their outputs into connected workflows, reports and audit evidence without replacing them.
final_title: Support MLRO reporting with audit-ready metrics
final_description: Review how SFTY structures compliance data into clear evidence packages and executive dashboards for board-level risk oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
